titleStmt.title: SII 25.293: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 292. (A.R. No. 292 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.
The inscription begins with the praśasti, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara-iru-nilamaḍandaiyum, etc., of the king. It furnishes the details of date viz., year 9, Dhanus, Sunday and Uttiraṭṭādi-nakshatra.

It records a deed executed by the Sabhai of Vembaṟṟūr alias Śōḻamāttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Vaḍagarai-Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu to the Chaṇḍēśvaradēva, the mūlabhṛitya of the temple of Śrīkuḍittiṭṭai-Paramasvāmi of the village after receiving 85 kāśu received from the latter, and granted the remission of taxes on the lands belonging to the above. The lands were to be enjoyed by the temple as iṟaiyili and the bhōgam collected from it was made over to the deity to meet the provision of food-offerings and to the priest who conducts worship in the temple. The amount of 85 kāśu received from the mūlabhṛityas of the temple include 60 kāśu of the share of the śrībhaṇḍaram-śeyvār of Nāgadāma-kramavittan of Irāyūr and a share of 25 kāśu of the tiruparichāragam-śeyvārgaḷ Śrīrāma-kramavittaṉ, of the temple of Rājarāja-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār.

The document was signed by the persons living in the different quarters (chēris) of the village Vembaṟṟūr. It is stated that there was a kaḍigai (ghaṭikā) in this village and the two madhyastas named Śrī Mādhavankramavittan and Vīramēy-Iraṇḍāyiravaṉ who figure as signatories belong to this kaḍigai. The suffix peruṅ-kāvidi ascribed to one of the madhyasthas, named Kūttāḍi alias Tribuvanamagādēvī (Tribhuvana-mahādēvī) is interesting.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭantai
yum por ceyyapāvaiyum cīrttaṉic cel
viyum tanperunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟaneṭutuyil Ū
ḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉa velippaṭarvaṉa
vāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkai
yum naṇṇaṟkkaramuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
porukaṭal Īḻattaraicar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavar
teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavaṉ pakkal te
ṉṉavan vaitta cuntara muṭiyum Intiraṉāramum teṇṭicaip po
rukaṭal Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṭipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimayil
cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum
caṅkatir velaittol peruṅkāval palpaḻantivum ceruvil
cciṉavil Irupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ meva
rum ñāntimaṟṟivaraṉ kariti Irittiya cempoṟ tirutta ku muṭiyum pa
yaṅkoṭu paḻimiku muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayakiṅkan Aḷapperum pu
ka ḻoṭu piṭiyil Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum yavanetik kulap perumalai
kaḷum māpporu taṇṭāṟkkoṇṭa kopparakesari vaṉmarāṉa śrīrājentra co
ḷa tevaṟku yāṇṭu Onpatāvatu vaṭakarai Irājentraciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu
brahmadeyam vempaṟṟūrākiya śrī coḻamāttāṇṭac caturvvetimaṅkalattu ma
hā sabhaiyom Ivvāṭṭai dhaṉunāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai peṟṟa Uttiraṭ
ṭāti nāṉṟu pakal maṇṭapatte dhanmi ceytu kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi IṟintupRead as iṟuntu-
ṇip paṇiyālp paṇittu nammūr śrīkuṭittiṭṭai Initeḻuṉtaruḷi Irunta para
ma svāmikku mulabhratyarāṉa caṇḍeśvara devar pakkal sabhaiyom koṇṭa kācu Iv
vūrkkāka Uṭaiyār śrīrājarāja Īśvaram Uṭaiyārkku śrībhaṇḍāram ceyappokiṉṟa
śrījaṉanādhacceri Irāyūr nākatāma kramavittaṉukku vārapalam kuṭukka koṇṭu kuṭutta
kācu Aṟupatum Itdevarke tirupparicārakam ceyya pokinṟa naṭoppaḷḷi śrīdharakrama
vittan makaṉ śrī rāmakramavittaṉukkum Iruṅkaṇṭi riṣabhanan=tikramavittan makan ca
ṅkara nārāyaṇa kramavittaṉukkum vārapalaṅkuṭukka koṇṭu kuṭutta kācu Irupattai
ñcum Āka koṇṭa kācu Eṇpattaiñcu Eṇpattaiñcuṅ koṇṭu Iśrīkuṭitiṭṭai
devar nilam Ivvūrkkiḻpiṭākai sarasvativatikku kiḻakku Arumoḻiteva vāykkālu
kku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattu Ittevarkku munpu A
daiyam ceytu nilam paḻampaṭi nilam Araikkālnikki Itanoṭu maṭaiykkiḻa
kku paḻampaṭinilaṉ nāṉkumākkāṇi nilamum Itiṉāl Ulakaḷantaruḷi Eṟivan
ta marainilam Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi Arai muntirikai kuḻi Araiye Irumā
varaiyum Ākanilam Aṟumā Araikkāṇi Arai muntirikaik kuḻi Araiye Irumā
varaiyiṉāl munṟān=tarattu maṭakkivanta kuṟunilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi mukkāl mu
ntirikaikkuḻi Onṟe Eṭṭumā Araikkāṇiyāl Iyyāṭṭai dhanuṉāyaṟu mu
tal Inṉilattāl van=ta Iṟaivācalilp ponta kuṭimai Iṟai sitdhāyakkācu
kkum pañcavārattukkum payaṟu tuvaraikkum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Ū
riṭu variyum ceri Īvum kulaiyum kurampum Uḷḷiṭṭa veṭṭi vetiṉaiyum sa
bhaiyome Ikkācu Eṇpattai
ñcukkum palicai cekuttu Iṟaiyi
ṟukka kaṭavomākavum sabhaiyom Iṟai
yiṟukka Inṉilam Adeyame Iṟaiyi
li Adeyame Anubhavikkap peṟuvārākavum
Inṉilattil bhogam Idevarkku ti
ruvamitukkum tiruvārātiṉai ceyvānukku
m Allatu sabhaiyomum sabhaiyo
mukkāka Avvavāṇṭukaḷ śrīkāryyañ ceyvārum Inṉila
m Idevar nilaṅkaḷil Iṟainilam Aṭṭi Inṉilatti
l bhogam koḷḷapperutomāka Ipparicu Irukālāva
tum mukkālāvatum Ikkācu Eṇpattaiñcum koṇṭu Ikkācu
kku palicai cekuttu Inṉilam parappa maṭakkivanta Innilam Iraṇṭu
mākkāṇi mukkāl muntirikaikkuḻi Onṟe Eṭṭu māvaraikkāṇikkum sa
bhaiyome Iṟaiyiṟukka Inṉilam cantrādityaval Iṟaiyili Anupa
vippikka kaṭavomākavum Ipparicu paṇippaṇiyāl paṇittu pramāṇam E
ḻuti kuṭuttom sabhaiyom Iṉnilattukku kiḻpāṟk kellai Ittevar ni
lattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai I
t tevarkku muṉpu Adeyam ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai kaṇ
ṇāṟṟukkut teṟkkum Āka Ivvicaitta peruṉān kellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam
paḻampaṭi nilam ṉānkku mākkāṇiyum Itināl Ulakaḷan=taruḷinamaikku vaṉtamikai nilam
Oru mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi Araimuntirikaiy kuḻi Araiye Irumāvaraiyumāka nilam Aṟumāva
raikkāṇi Arai muntirikaiyum kuḻi Araiye Irumā munṟān=taram maṭakkivan=ta kuṟu
kuṟunilam Iraṇṭumākkāṇi mukkāl mun=tirikaiyum kuḻi Oṉ ṇakkāṇiyāl vaṉta
Iṟai Epperppaṭṭatum sabhaiyom koṇṭa I Eṇpattaiñcu kācukkum palicai cekuttu
Ivvāṭṭai dhanuṉāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai peṟṟa Uttirāṭa mutal sabhaiyome Eppeṟppa
ṭṭa varikaḷum Iṟukka Iṉnilam Itdevarkku Iṟaiyili cantrādityaval Adeyam Iṟaiyili cantrā
dityaval Aṉubhavikka peṟuvārākavum Itaṟṟiṟampiṟ dharmmāsaṉattu muṉpu niṟkkilu
m nillāviṭilum Ittevarkaṉmikaḷ tāṅkaḷ veṇṭukaḷattu tāṅkaḷ veṇ
ṭu poṉ manṟi Iṟuppittum Inṉilam Adeyame Anubhavikkappeṟuvārāka I
p paricu paṇip paṇiyāl paṇittu Adeyam ceytu pramāṇam Eḻutikkuṭuttom śrī ku
ṭittiṭṭai Iṉiteḻuṉtaruḷi Irun=ta paramasvāmikku mula bhrityarāṉa caṇḍeśvara devaṟkku ve
mpaṟṟūraākiya śrī coḻamāttāṇṭacaturvveti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ipparicu sa
bhaiyiliruntu prāmāṇam Eḻutappaṇittār śrī Arumoḻi tevacceri maṇalūr tāyaṉke
cuvanārum janaṉādhacceri Aruḷūrk kecupaṭṭaru makaṉ nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉum nittavinoda
cceri Irāyūr coṭṭai caṅkaraṉārāyaṇa kramavittanum Irājakesaricceri sa ha
ṇa kovinta bhaṭṭaṉum nikarilicoḻacceri kārampicceṭṭu Aḻakumāra paṭṭaṉum
cceri Uṟuppuṭṭur veṇkā
ṭaṉum coḻa māttāṇṭac ceri
vāmaṉa kramavittaṉum rāja rāja
kaṇṭi tiruveṇkāṭa bhaṭṭaṉum Iruṅ
tu kramavittaṉum paṇiyāl Eḻu
Ivvūrk kaṭikai madhyastan śrī mātavaṉ kra
nen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟi�
ratāyan kūttan caṭaṅkaviyen Ippaṭi Aṟiven
tan tāmotiranen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr
�teva paṭṭa ne
vūr vaikāṉasa taman tāmotiraṉ kuṇa
tevapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi paṇiyāl Ivvūr madhyasta
n kūttāṭiyāna tiripuvana makātevi peruṅkāviti
Aṟiven Ivvūr śivabrāhmaṇaṉ pāratāyaṉ
paiyaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūrkkā
veḷḷāḷaṉ tirumayamuṭaiyāṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūr madhyastaṉ
tiruvaraṅkapiriyaṉen Ivai
Aṟiveṉ Ivūr kaṭikai madhyastaṉ vira
mey Iraṇṭāyiravaneṉ §
Digital edition of SII 25.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
